questionHtml:
The demand curve faced by firms in the widget industry is downward sloping.

Sketch the marginal revenue (MR) curve for firms in the widget industry.
markschemeHtml: Award [1] for an accurate, labelled MR curve (MR must be downward-sloping but need not be linear and need not become negative).

meta.title: Sketch the marginal revenue (MR) curve for firms in the widget industry.
